test_cases.name: health_check_ok
test_cases.description: Health check endpoint returns 200 OK.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_validation_error
test_cases.description: Attempt to create author with missing required field (name) returns 422.

test_cases.name: get_author_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_modified
test_cases.description: Request with If-None-Match header matching ETag returns 304.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_conflict
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author with associated books returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a new book with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with duplicate ISBN returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_author_id
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with non-existent author_id returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing, non-deleted book by ID.

test_cases.name: get_book_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Successfully soft delete a book (returns 204).

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Successfully restore a soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: restore_not_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore a book that is not deleted returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_success
test_cases.description: Apply discount to an old book (published >1 year ago).

test_cases.name: apply_discount_new_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceeding rate limit (5 req/10s) on discount endpoint returns 429.

test_cases.name: update_stock_increase
test_cases.description: Increase book stock by positive quantity.

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock below zero returns 400.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_success
test_cases.description: Successfully upload a JPEG/PNG cover under 2 MB.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a file larger than 2 MB returns 413.

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Successfully add a review to a book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a tag with duplicate name returns 409.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_success
test_cases.description: Successfully add multiple tags to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create an order with sufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Attempt to create order with insufficient stock returns 400.

test_cases.name: create_order_duplicate_book_id
test_cases.description: Attempt to create order with duplicate book_id in items returns 400.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid_transition
test_cases.description: Successfully update order status along a valid transition (pending -> confirmed).

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid status transition (pending -> shipped) returns 400.
